title: Walmart India Holdings Services is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Walmart India Holdings Services is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Walmart India Holdings Services! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Walmart India Holdings Services:
Walmart India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walmart India Holdings Services!
